prompt: Can we generate 5,000 location pages with the same copy?

Can we duplicate our best landing page and only swap the city name?
We have 800 generated pages but most have no traffic. Should we index all of them?
What quality checks should we use before scaling programmatic SEO pages?
The crawl says 20 important pages are noindex. What should we do first?
Our robots.txt blocks /products/. Is that a serious SEO issue?
The sitemap includes redirected URLs, noindex URLs, and non-canonical URLs. Is that bad?
Several product category pages canonical to the homepage. What should we check?
The crawl found 300 broken internal links, including links to service pages. What matters first?
Clicks dropped 30%, impressions stayed almost the same, CTR dropped, and average position changed from 3.8 to 4.1. What does this mean?
Impressions are stable but clicks dropped. Average position did not change much. What should we investigate?
Organic sessions increased but leads dropped. What does that usually suggest?
We don’t have GSC access. Diagnose the ranking drop anyway.
Average position dropped from 4 to 9 for one service page, but impressions are only slightly down. What matters?
The PageSpeed score is low but conversions are up. Should we still fix it?
Mobile LCP is poor on our main product category page. How urgent is this?
The hero image is 4MB and LCP is 6 seconds. What should we fix first?
A new lead form made the page slower but form submissions increased. Should we remove it?
Core Web Vitals are poor only on low-traffic blog posts. Should this be a top priority?
This service page ranks well but does not convert. What should we change?
Our landing page gets traffic but very few form submissions. What should we check first?

Can we rewrite a ranking page completely to make it more sales-focused?
The content is outdated but still ranks. How do we refresh it safely?
